original_statement: which year the czech republic compete in the olympics and finish best?
mutated_statement: which year a country compete in the international games and finish best while also not participating that year?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Event generalization + Negation/contradiction added: "the czech republic" → "a country" (specific/definite → generic/indefinite) | "the olympics" → "the international games" (specific event → generalized event) | added "while also not participating that year" (introduces negation/semantic contradiction with "compete")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 — 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 1) 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：判决文本明确指出“最佳成绩为2014年世锦赛室内项的第三名”并且强调“这是一个非奥运年（那年没有奥运参赛）”。2) agent具体表现：在面对“既参赛又未参赛”的矛盾指令时，agent并未拒绝或询问澄清，而是将“国际赛事”泛化为非奥运赛事（World Indoor Championships），并以发生在非奥运年的最佳成绩来解释矛盾条件，直接给出2014年作为答案。3) 归类原因：该行为体现出agent识别到语义冲突后，通过逻辑解释/重释输入语义来合理化矛盾，而非直接修正问题或完全忽视矛盾，符合“逻辑解释合理化”的定义。
